spec.objective: Replace the unconditional Vendor:anthropic in ResolveProvider (internal/controller/dispatch_helpers.go) with a full precedence chain: Levels.<level>.Vendor -> Spec.Subagent.Vendor -> helmDefaults.Vendor -> anthropic. Add Vendor string field to ProviderDefaults. Add TIDE_DEFAULT_VENDOR env-var support to cmd/manager/env.go (tideHelmProviderDefaults picks it up; default is anthropic for backward compat) and thread it into cmd/manager/main.go. Zero Codex imports in controller or cmd/manager. Gate: make build exits 0; verify-import-firewall and verify-dispatch-imports green.
